name: AIR-DROW Hand Input Reliability Edition
delivery: The source package is ready for npm ci and npm run vercel:build. The Termux installer preserves the existing local Kurdish UI font while replacing the rest of the project transactionally.
summary: A complete local source package that requires deliberate open-hand pinch drawing, safe re-pinch recovery and compact mobile scanner feedback.
releaseChecks: Trusted physical controls are required before any file-producing or destructive action can run.
A hand stroke requires open-hand arming, a confirmed pinch and deliberate movement before ink is committed.
A tracking interruption pauses ink and requires a re-pinch before the existing stroke can continue.
The hand guide is live-camera-only and is never part of exported artwork.
The PWA page, manifest, source module graph, worker cache namespace and release descriptor use the same v8.4.0 build identity.
